title: Preview briefing
overview: This preview demonstrates the editorial structure. After deployment, the daily workflow replaces it with recent records from OpenAlex, arXiv, and Europe PMC, labeling preprints and ranking items as high-signal reading rather than confirmed breakthroughs.

items.title: AI consciousness research may need more tractable questions
items.why_it_matters: The proposal shifts attention from an unresolved yes-or-no question toward measurable social, psychological, and governance consequences.

items.title: AI pose estimation as continuous neuromonitoring
items.why_it_matters: The work illustrates how computer vision could help track neurological status without adding invasive monitoring hardware.

items.title: A landmark constraint on quantum-brain theories
items.why_it_matters: Tegmark’s decoherence calculation remains important context for evaluating newer claims that invoke quantum coherence in consciousness.
